prompt_template:
Query: "{query}"
Document: {doc_text}

This query contains negation or constraints. Score how well this document satisfies the query INCLUDING any negation constraints (e.g., "not indicated" means the document should have contraindication data, not indication data).

Score 0-10 where 0=completely irrelevant, 10=perfect match.
Output ONLY the number.
rationale: Reduced alpha from 0.7 to 0.4 to decrease LLM influence. Failure cases show LLM consistently underscoring gold documents (giving 0-7) while overscoring competitors (7-9), but mFAR scores for gold docs are often reasonable. Lower alpha gives more weight to mFAR retrieval scores which appear more reliable for negation queries.
